structuralBlockers: Willingness to relocate to Austin/Fremont required; not addressable by self-study
Production experience implementing real-time decoding from neural signals expected; portfolio projects alone unlikely to substitute

alternativeTargetBranches.rationale: Smaller teams value demonstrated Python/ML prototyping and agentic tooling more than production BCI experience.
alternativeTargetBranches.tradeoffs: Lower compensation ceiling and less access to clinical participant data compared to Neuralink.

alternativeTargetBranches.rationale: Leverages existing LLM orchestration and Python skills; real-time requirements are lighter than BCI.
alternativeTargetBranches.tradeoffs: Moves away from direct neural interface work; domain shifts to regulatory and EHR systems.

suggestedArtefact.title: Reproduce and extend a published motor BCI decoder
suggestedArtefact.description: Implement a working offline decoder from a primary paper and demonstrate calibration on public dataset.
acceptanceCriteria: Decoder reproduces reported accuracy within 5% on held-out data from the paper's dataset.
Calibration script runs end-to-end in under 10 minutes on standard hardware.
Repository includes Jupyter notebook reproducing main results figure.
README documents assumptions and deviations from original paper.
Code passes unit tests for feature extraction and training steps.

suggestedArtefact.title: Low-latency streaming decoder prototype
suggestedArtefact.description: Build a Python pipeline that ingests simulated neural data and outputs control signals with measured sub-50ms latency.
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end latency under 50 ms on benchmark hardware.
No sample loss during 30-minute continuous run.
Pipeline uses ring buffer and separate processing thread.
Latency histogram and CPU profile included in repo.
Code includes simulated hardware driver interface.

suggestedArtefact.title: BCI feature design document

Risk section addresses participant safety and data quality.

suggestedArtefact.title: Compare three decoders on public motor BCI dataset
suggestedArtefact.description: Benchmark Kalman, LDA, and simple RNN on the same dataset with latency and accuracy metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: All three decoders achieve published baseline performance.
Benchmark report includes latency, accuracy, and bitrate.
Code is modular so new decoder can be swapped in <1 day.
Results table matches format used in primary literature.
Repo contains dataset loader and reproducible training scripts.
